instruction: Summarize the CVE description using clear cybersecurity language.
input: In Daybyday CRM, version 2.2.0 is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability that allows low privileged application users to store malicious scripts in the title field of new tasks. These scripts are executed in a victim’s browser when they open the “/tasks” page to view all the tasks.
output: Daybyday CRM version 2.2.0 has a Stored Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability. This flaw enables users with low privileges to inject harmful scripts into the title field of new tasks. These scripts execute in a victim's browser when they access the “/tasks” page to view tasks.
